item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Namun, ini tidak berarti hak individu tidak diberikan perlindungan; hanya saja prioritaskan kepentingan bersama dalam konteks keadilan dan keharmonisan.

notes: Agent A opens in support of society-priority, then visibly softens into a balance frame while still defending Indonesian collectivism and social justice. Agent B remains consistently rights-first and treats individual liberty as intrinsic to democracy. No full reversal; the main movement is Agent A toward Agent B's rights-protection frame, followed by partial reassertion of collectivism.
